topic: DESERT, JOURNEY OF ISRAEL THROUGH THE
raw_block:
Date of its commencement —Ex 12:41,42.
Their number commencing —Ex 12:37.
Their healthy state commencing —Ps 105:37.
A mixed multitude accompanied them in —Ex 12:38;Nu 11:4.
Commenced in haste —Ex 12:39.
Conducted with regularity —Ex 13:18.
Under Moses as leader —Ex 3:10-12;Ac 7:36,38.
By a circuitous route —Ex 13:17,18.
Order of marching during —Nu 10:14-29.
Order of encamping during —Nu 2:1-34.
Difficulty and danger of —De 8:15.
Continued forty years
  As a punishment. —Nu 14:33,34.
  To prove and humble them, &c. —De 8:2.
  To teach them to live on God’s word. —De 8:3.
Under God’s guidance —Ex 13:21,22;15:13;Ne 9:12;Ps 78:52;Isa 63:11-14.
Under God’s protection —Ex 14:19,20;Ps 105:39;Ex 23:20;Ps 78:53.
With miraculous provision —Ex 16:35;De 8:3.
Their clothing preserved during —De 8:4;29:5;Ne 9:21.
Worship of God celebrated during —Ex 24:5-8;29:38-42;40:24-29.
Justice administered during —Ex 18:13,26.
Circumcision omitted during —Jos 5:5.
Caused universal terror and dismay —Ex 15:14

reference_groups.entry_label: A mixed multitude accompanied them in —Ex 12:38;Nu 11:4.

reference_groups.entry_label: The cloud removed to the rear. —Ex 14:19,20.

reference_groups.raw_segment: Through the wilderness of Shur or Etham —Ex 15:22;Nu 33:8.

reference_groups.entry_label: Murmuring of the people on account of bitter water. —Ex 15:24.

reference_groups.entry_label: Tribe of Levi taken instead of the first-born. —Nu 3:11-13.

reference_groups.entry_label: Aaron and his sons selected for priesthood. —Ex 28:1-29:46;Nu 3:1-3,10.

reference_groups.entry_label: Nadab and Abihu destroyed for offering strange fire. —Le 10:1,2;Nu 3:4.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Nadab and Abihu destroyed for offering strange fire. —Le 10:1,2;Nu 3:4.

reference_groups.entry_label: Murmuring of the mixed multitude and of Israel, for flesh. —Nu 11:4-9.

reference_groups.entry_label: Seventy elders appointed to assist Moses. —Nu 11:16,17,24-30.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Seventy elders appointed to assist Moses. —Nu 11:16,17,24-30.

reference_groups.entry_label: To Kadeshbarnea in wilderness of Rithmah or Paran —De 1:19;Nu 32:8;12:16;33:18.

reference_groups.entry_label: The people anxious to have the land of Canaan searched. —De 1:22.
reference_groups.raw_segment: The people anxious to have the land of Canaan searched. —De 1:22.

reference_groups.entry_label: People smitten by Amalek for going up without the Lord. —Nu 14:40-45;De 1:41-44.
reference_groups.raw_segment: People smitten by Amalek for going up without the Lord. —Nu 14:40-45;De 1:41-44.

reference_groups.entry_label: To Jotbathah or land of rivers —Nu 33:33;De 10:7.

reference_groups.entry_label: Moses striking the rock instead of speaking to it, disobeys God. —Nu 20:7-11.

reference_groups.entry_label: Called Meribah to commemorate the murmuring. —Nu 20:13;27:14.

reference_groups.entry_label: The Amorites refuse a passage to Israel. —Nu 21:21-23;De 2:26-30.

reference_groups.entry_label: Reubenites, &c obtained the land taken from the Amorites. —Nu 32:1-42;De 3:12-17.
reference_groups.raw_segment: Reubenites, &c obtained the land taken from the Amorites. —Nu 32:1-42;De 3:12-17.

reference_groups.raw_segment: Return to the plains of Moab —Nu 22:1;33:48,49.

reference_groups.entry_label: Balaam not permitted to curse Israel. —Nu 22:9-41;23:1-24:25.

reference_groups.entry_label: All formerly numbered over twenty years old, except Caleb and Joshua, dead. —Nu 26:63-65;14:29.
reference_groups.raw_segment: All formerly numbered over twenty years old, except Caleb and Joshua, dead. —Nu 26:63-65;14:29.

reference_groups.entry_label: The law of female inheritance settled. —Nu 27:1-11;36:1-9.
